place: Ban Makham, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Sea-View Pool Villa - Ban Makham
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa on Koh Samui's quiet north-west coast at Ban Makham, with an infinity-edge pool above the sand and direct beach access. 340 m² of contemporary interior plus around 250 m² of terraces on a 420 m² freehold plot — private gym, studio/office, a pool-table bar and a BBQ sala. Freehold Chanote title, offered at ฿48,800,000.
detail:
On the sand at Ban Makham, on Koh Samui's quiet north-west coast, this five-bedroom villa opens directly onto the beach, with an infinity-edge pool set above the water and an outlook across the Gulf. The setting is unhurried and sunset-facing — Bang Po beach is a few minutes away and Nathon around ten — and the house is designed to be lived in indoors and out in equal measure.

The contemporary design gives roughly 340 m² of air-conditioned interior alongside some 250 m² of terraces and covered outdoor space, on a 420 m² plot with a private garden. A generous open-plan living and dining room flows through sliding walls to the pool deck and a fully equipped modern Western kitchen, while an outdoor sala with a barbecue corner, an entertainment area with a pool table and bar, and a private gym turn the home into a resort of its own.

All five bedrooms are en-suite, and a dedicated studio/office suits remote work. Practical touches round out the plan — a separate laundry and storage room, and private parking for a car and motorbikes.

Held on a Freehold Chanote title with direct beachfront access, the villa is equally suited to family living or a high-yield rental, and trades as an established beachfront rental today. Offered at ฿48,800,000.

features.l: Direct access to Ban Makham Beach
